title: #[non_exhaustive] on SecretError is the right API choice
description: SecretError is #[non_exhaustive], which means downstream callers cannot write exhaustive match arms. This is correct: new error variants (e.g. PermissionDenied, RateLimited) can be added in minor versions without breaking callers who use _ => as a fallback. A contributor may suggest removing #[non_exhaustive] for 'ergonomics' (exhaustive matching). Resist: once removed, adding a variant is a semver-breaking change. Keep it.
